## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed
- whether this affects protocol behavior, docs, or tooling

## Koinara v1 Checklist

- [ ] This keeps v1 focused on minimum viable protocol behavior
- [ ] This does not introduce bridge, cross-chain settlement, zkML, DAO governance, or advanced oracle logic
- [ ] This does not confuse protocol validity with market quality
- [ ] MAI / PoI terminology remains consistent across code and docs
- [ ] Access control and state transitions were reviewed
- [ ] Tests were added or updated where behavior changed
- [ ] `forge fmt --check`, `forge build`, and `forge test -vv` pass locally

- Contracts:
- Docs:
- Tests:
- Scripts:

- state transitions touched:
